revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Ichisuka-jinja]][[ja:一須何神社]] {{Expand Japanese|一須何神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ichisuka Shrine | native_name = 一須何神社 | image = 壹須何神社拝殿 河南町一須賀 Ichisuka-jinja 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ichisuka Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.506808|135.625809}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|lt=Ōkuninushi|ca|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|es|Ōkuninushi|fa|اوکونینوشی|fr|Ōkuninushi|hu|Ókuninusi|id|Ookuninushi|it|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主|ko|오오쿠니누시|mni|ꯑꯣꯀꯨꯅꯤꯅꯨꯁꯤ|pl|Ōkuninushi|pt|Ookuninushi|ru|Окунинуси|simple|Ōkuninushi|sr|Okuninuši|sv|Ōkuninushi|tr|Ōkuninushi|uk|Окунінуші|vi|Ōkuninushi|zh|大國主|qid=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Ichisuka Shrine'''|一須何神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11553385|ltq=Q11553385|qid=Q11553385|1=List of Shikinaisha in Kawachi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 8 ** P155: {{ill|Kanko Shrine|lt=Kanko Shrine|ja|咸古神社|qid=Q11418296|1=Kanko Shrine}} ** P155: {{ill|Q135098868|ltq=Q135098868|qid=Q135098868|1=Kankosahino Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Kamonaraita Shrine|lt=Kamonaraita Shrine|ja|鴨習太神社|qid=Q11675603|1=Kamonaraita Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q2305508|ltq=Q2305508|qid=Q2305508|1=Kanan, Osaka}} * {{ill|Q1047150|ltq=Q1047150|qid=Q1047150|1=Kawachi Province}} * {{ill|Ishikawa district|lt=Ishikawa district|ja|石川郡 (大阪府)|zh|石川郡 (大阪府)|qid=Q11586399|1=Ishikawa district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.506808|135.625809}} == image (P18) == * 壹須何神社拝殿 河南町一須賀 Ichisuka-jinja 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * (P13723) == * {{ill|Son-sha|lt=Son-sha|ja|村社|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Q3193781|ltq=Q3193781|qid=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} == country (P17) == * Dineʼé Bikéyah|ny|Japan|oc|Japon|olo|Japounii|om|Jaappaan|or|ଜାପାନ|os|Япон|pag|Hapon|pam|Hapon|pap|Hapon|pa|ਜਪਾਨ|pcd|Japon|pcm|Japan|pdc|Japan|pfl|Japan|pl|Japonia|plnews|Kategoria:Japonia|plquote|Japonia|plvoyage|Japonia|pms|Giapon|pnb|جاپان|pnt|Ιαπωνία|ps|جاپان|pt|Japão|ptnews|Categoria:Japão|ptquote|Japão|ptvoyage|Japão|pwn|Dripun|qu|Hapun|rm|Giapun|rmy|Japan|rn|Yapon|roa_rup|Japonia|roa_tara|Giappone|ro|Japonia|ronews|Categorie:Japonia|rovoyage|Japonia|rue|Японія|ru|Япония|runews|Категория:Япония|ruvoyage|Япония|rw|Ubuyapani|sah|Дьоппуон|sat|ᱡᱟᱯᱟᱱ|sa|जपान्|scn|Giappuni|sco|Japan|sc|Giapone|sd|جاپان|se|Jáhpan|sg|Zapöo|shn|မိူင်းၵျႃႇပၢၼ်ႇ|sh|Japan|simple|Japan|si|ජපානය|skr|جاپان|sk|Japonsko|sl|Japonska|smn|Jaapaan|sm|Iapani|sn|Japani|so|Jabaan|sq|Japonia|sqnews|Kategoria:Japoni|srn|Japan|sr|Јапан|srnews|Категорија:Јапан|srquote|Јапан|ss|IJapani|stq|Japan|st|Japane|su|Jepang|sv|Japan|svnews|Kategori:Japan|svvoyage|Japan|sw|Japani|syl|ꠎꠣꠙꠣꠘ|szl|Japůńijo|szy|Zipun|ta|யப்பான்|tanews|பகுப்பு:ஜப்பான்|tay|Gipun|tcy|ಜಪಾನ್|tdd|ᥛᥫᥒᥰ ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * いちすかじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 9120105004702 == Commons category (P373) == * Ichisuka-jinja == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '大阪府南河内郡河南町一須賀628', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Ichisuka-jinja}} [[JA:一須何神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11353282}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name=Ichisuka Shrine |Image=[[Image:Ichisuka-Jinja-20071209.JPG|270px]]
Worship hall |Location={{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Minamikawachi District|Q1347323|qid=Q1347323|1=Minamikawachi District, Osaka}}{{ill|lt=Kanan Town|Q2305508|qid=Q2305508|1=Kanan, Osaka}} Ichisuka 628 |Coordinates= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities={{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi}}
{{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|qid=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}}
{{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}}
{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|qid=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} |Shrine rank={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded=Unknown |Main hall={{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|qid=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |Alternate name= |Pilgrimage status= |Annual festival=Annual festival (3rd Saturday of October) |Rituals= |Map= {{Location map|Japan Osaka|label=Ichisuka Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ichisuka Shrine''' (いちすかじんじゃ, 壹須何神社, 壱須何神社) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Minamikawachi District|Q1347323|qid=Q1347323|1=Minamikawachi District, Osaka}}{{ill|lt=Kanan Town|Q2305508|qid=Q2305508|1=Kanan, Osaka}} (formerly {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Village (Osaka Prefecture)|Q18700174|qid=Q18700174|lt=Ishikawa Village|1=Ishikawa}}). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, and its former shrine rank was {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === ; Principal deities * {{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi}} (おおなむちのみこと) * {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|qid=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} (あまてらすおおかみ) * {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} (あめのこやねのみこと) * {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|qid=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} (ほんだわけのみこと) ; Associated deities * {{ill|lt=Tenjin worship|Q66890725|qid=Q66890725|lt=Tenman Daijizai Tenjin|1=Tenjin faith}} – former enshrined deity of Sugawara Shrine * {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Oshihomimi-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Oshihomimi-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|lt=Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Q1056017|qid=Q1056017|lt=Amatsuhikohikohoninigi-no-Mikoto|1=Ninigi-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|lt=Hoori|Q1051960|qid=Q1051960|lt=Hikohodemi-no-Mikoto|1=Hoori}} * {{ill|lt=Ugayafukiaezu|Q1373935|qid=Q1373935|lt=Hikonagisatakeugayafukiaezu-no-Mikoto|1=Ugayafukiaezu}} * {{ill|lt=Emperor Jimmu|Q200188|qid=Q200188|lt=Kamuyamato Iwarebiko-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Jimmu}} – the above five deities were formerly enshrined at Furubata Shrine This area was the base of the {{ill|lt=Soga clan|Q909854|qid=Q909854|1=Soga clan}} descendants, the {{ill|lt=Ishikawa clan|Q615039|qid=Q615039|lt=Ishikawa no Ason|1=Ishikawa clan}}, and sources such as *Kawachi no Kuni Shikijin Shikō* and *Watarai-shi Shinjin Nabari Kōshō* state that it was originally dedicated to the ancestral founder Soga no Ishikawa no Sukune. The current enshrined deities are thought to have been established in the early Edo period, and during the Edo period the shrine was called “Tenjin.” *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Dai Nihon Jingi Shi|1=UNKNOWN}}* records it as “currently popularly known as Ichikawa Myōjin.” === History === Although the circumstances of its founding are unknown, the area was the base of the {{ill|lt=Ishikawa clan|Q615039|qid=Q615039|lt=Ishikawa no Ason|1=Ishikawa clan}}, and as it forms part of the {{ill|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Group|Q11353283|qid=Q11353283|1=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}}, it is believed to have originally stood atop a burial mound. In the *{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}*, it is listed as a minor shrine. During the {{ill|lt=Nanboku-chō period (Japan)|Q264012|qid=Q264012|lt=Nanboku-chō period|1=Nanboku-chō period}}, the Southern Court’s {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Castle (Osaka Prefecture)|UNKNOWN|lt=Ishikawa Castle}} was built here, and the shrine suffered repeated damage from warfare. In {{ill|lt=1589|Q6759|qid=Q6759|1=1589}} ({{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|qid=Q1145058|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 17), {{ill|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Q187550|qid=Q187550|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} issued a certificate granting prayers and precinct privileges through the {{ill|lt=Ishikawa District (Osaka Prefecture)|Q11586399|qid=Q11586399|lt=Ishikawa District magistrate|1=Ishikawa district}} {{ill|lt=Itō Hidemori|UNKNOWN|lt=Itō Kaganokami Hidemori}}. A ceremonial hot-water cauldron dedicated at that time remains as a shrine treasure.[http://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kananchotte/kankogaido/terajinja/1494915847108.html　Ichisuka Shrine - Kanan Town] Accessed February 9, 2019 In the *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kawachi Meisho Zue|1=UNKNOWN}}*, published in 1801 ({{ill|lt=Kyōwa|Q960763|qid=Q960763|1=Kyōwa}} 1), it states: “Ichisuka Shrine is located in Ichisuka Village, referred to in the Engishiki as the present Tenjin. It is the tutelary shrine of this village and Ōgatsuka Village. An Eleven-faced Kannon is enshrined in the temple-shrine complex.” In 1872 (Meiji 5), it was ranked as a village shrine, and in 1907 (Meiji 40), it {{ill|lt=Shrine consolidation|Q11590700|qid=Q11590700|lt=merged|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}} the village shrines Sugawara Shrine (Ōaza Higashiyama, Ishikawa Village) and Furubata Shrine (Ōaza Minami-Ōtomo, {{ill|lt=Ōtomo Village|Q18700091|qid=Q18700091|1=Ōtomo}}). === Local information === ; Address * {{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Minamikawachi District|Q1347323|qid=Q1347323|1=Minamikawachi District, Osaka}}{{ill|lt=Kanan Town|Q2305508|qid=Q2305508|1=Kanan, Osaka}} Ichisuka 628 ; Access * Nearest station: From {{ill|lt=Tondabayashi Station|Q7820789|qid=Q7820789|1=Tondabayashi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Minami Osaka Line|Q901342|qid=Q901342|1=Minami Osaka Line}}, take the {{ill|lt=Four-municipality community bus|Q133808476|qid=Q133808476|1=Kongō Furusato Bus}} bound for Higashiyama; get off at the “Ichisuka” bus stop, about a 5-minute walk. === Notes === === References === {{Reference help}} {{Reflist}} === External links === {{commons|Category:Ichisuka-jinja}} * [http://www.osaka-jinjacho.jp/funai_jinja/dai11shibu/kanan-cho/11019ichisukajinja.html Ichisuka Shrine - Osaka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines] {{Shinto navbox}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ichisuka Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ichisuka Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ichisuka Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kawachi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Son-sha in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kanan, Osaka]] [[Category:Municipal History of Kanan]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kawachi Province]] [[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]]
